tools.name: Midjourney
tools.description: AI art generator creating stunning high-quality images from text prompts
tools.fullDescription: Midjourney is a generative AI program that creates images from natural language descriptions. It uses Discord-based commands to generate artistic imagery. The tool is known for producing high-quality, creative, and diverse images across various art styles.
tools.useCase: Creating artwork, concept art, design mockups, marketing graphics, and artistic illustrations

tools.name: DALL-E 3
tools.description: OpenAI's advanced image generation model creating photorealistic and artistic images
tools.fullDescription: DALL-E 3 is OpenAI's latest image generation model that creates highly detailed and accurate images from natural language descriptions. It understands nuance and detail, generating high-quality images that match descriptions better than ever.
tools.useCase: Marketing materials, product visualization, digital art, design concepts

tools.name: Stable Diffusion
tools.description: Open-source AI image generator creating images from text with high quality results
tools.fullDescription: Stable Diffusion is a text-to-image generation model that is open-source and runs on consumer-grade GPUs. It provides users with creative control and can be customized with various models and plugins.
tools.useCase: Concept art, game assets, UI mockups, NFT generation, creative illustrations

tools.name: Runway
tools.description: AI-powered video editing and generation platform making content creation easy
tools.fullDescription: Runway ML is an AI-powered platform for video generation and editing. It offers tools for creating videos from text, background removal, motion transfer, and more, all with an intuitive interface.
tools.useCase: Video content creation, marketing videos, social media content, video editing

tools.name: Synthesia
tools.description: AI video generation platform creating professional videos from text scripts
tools.fullDescription: Synthesia is an AI video creation platform that allows users to create professional videos from text. It uses AI avatars that can speak different languages and is perfect for creating educational and training videos.
tools.useCase: Training videos, educational content, marketing videos, corporate communication

tools.name: Jukebox
tools.description: OpenAI's music generation AI creating original songs and melodies
tools.fullDescription: Jukebox is an AI model developed by OpenAI that can generate music in a variety of genres and styles. It can continue musical pieces and generate new compositions from scratch.
tools.useCase: Background music, soundtrack creation, creative exploration, game audio

tools.name: Soundraw
tools.description: AI music generator creating royalty-free music tracks in seconds
tools.fullDescription: Soundraw is an AI music generation platform that creates original, royalty-free music. Users can specify mood, length, and instrumentation to generate custom tracks.
tools.useCase: YouTube videos, podcasts, streaming content, game soundtracks, advertisements

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: Advanced conversational AI assistant for writing, coding, and problem-solving
tools.fullDescription: ChatGPT is an advanced AI language model developed by OpenAI. It can generate human-like text, assist with writing, answer questions, debug code, and much more through natural conversation.
tools.useCase: Content writing, customer support, brainstorming, coding assistance, general Q&A

tools.name: Cohere
tools.description: API and platform for text generation and natural language understanding
tools.fullDescription: Cohere provides API access to powerful language models for text generation, classification, and semantic search. It's designed for developers and businesses building AI applications.
tools.useCase: Content generation, customer service automation, text classification, semantic search

tools.name: Jasper
tools.description: AI writing assistant for marketing copy, blogs, and content creation
tools.fullDescription: Jasper is an AI-powered writing tool designed specifically for marketing and content creation. It generates high-quality copy for ads, blogs, emails, and social media leveraging advanced AI models.
tools.useCase: Marketing copy, blog posts, email campaigns, social media content, product descriptions

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.description: Free AI writing tool generating marketing copy and content quickly
tools.fullDescription: Copy.ai is a free AI writing assistant that helps create marketing copy, social media posts, and other content. It's user-friendly and doesn't require a credit card to start.
tools.useCase: Social media posts, product descriptions, ad copy, email writing, blog outlines

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.description: AI-powered code completion and generation tool for developers
tools.fullDescription: GitHub Copilot is an AI coding assistant that helps developers write code faster. It suggests entire functions, handles repetitive coding tasks, and supports multiple programming languages.
tools.useCase: Code writing, debugging, documentation generation, test writing

tools.name: Tabnine
tools.description: AI code completion tool that learns your coding patterns and style
tools.fullDescription: Tabnine is an AI-powered code completion tool that learns from your code and suggests completions based on your coding patterns. It works with most popular IDEs and languages.
tools.useCase: Faster coding, reducing boilerplate, learning best practices, code completion

tools.name: Codeium
tools.description: Free AI code completion and search tool for developers
tools.fullDescription: Codeium is a free AI code completion tool that provides fast, accurate completions across multiple languages. It's lightweight and works well in most IDEs.
tools.useCase: Code completion, faster development, learning code patterns

tools.name: Grammarly
tools.description: AI writing assistant checking grammar, tone, and clarity in real-time
tools.fullDescription: Grammarly is an AI-powered writing assistant that checks grammar, spelling, punctuation, and tone. It helps users write better, more confident communication across multiple platforms.
tools.useCase: Email writing, document editing, social media posts, professional communication

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.description: AI-powered features integrated into Notion workspace management
tools.fullDescription: Notion AI brings generative AI capabilities directly into Notion workspaces. Users can generate content, summarize pages, brainstorm ideas, and more without leaving Notion.
tools.useCase: Note organization, content generation, research assistance, project planning

tools.name: Obsidian
tools.description: Privacy-focused note-taking app with network visualization and AI integration
tools.fullDescription: Obsidian is a powerful knowledge management tool that stores notes locally on your device. It features a unique graph view for visualizing connections between notes and supports plugins for AI integration.
tools.useCase: Note-taking, knowledge management, research organization, personal wiki

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.description: AI voice generation creating natural-sounding text-to-speech audio
tools.fullDescription: ElevenLabs provides advanced AI voice generation technology that creates natural-sounding synthetic voices. It supports multiple languages and voice styles for various applications.
tools.useCase: Audiobooks, video voiceovers, podcast production, Game audio, accessibility features

tools.name: Google Gemini
tools.description: Google's advanced AI assistant for creative and analytical tasks
tools.fullDescription: Google Gemini is Google's latest AI assistant that can help with writing, analysis, math, coding, and creative tasks. It's available through web interface and has strong integration with Google services.
tools.useCase: Content creation, coding help, data analysis, creative writing, research assistance

tools.name: Perplexity AI
tools.description: AI search engine that answers questions with cited sources
tools.fullDescription: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered search engine that understands natural language questions and provides comprehensive answers with citations. It combines information retrieval with generative AI.
tools.useCase: Research, learning, fact-checking, question answering, knowledge discovery

tools.name: QuillBot
tools.description: AI paraphrasing tool for rewriting and improving written content
tools.fullDescription: QuillBot is an AI writing assistant that helps paraphrase, check plagiarism, and improve writing. It's particularly useful for students and academic writers.
tools.useCase: Academic writing, paraphrasing, plagiarism checking, vocabulary improvement

tools.name: Canva Magic Design
tools.description: AI-powered design tool with Magic Design for quick professional designs
tools.fullDescription: Canva is a design platform that uses AI Magic Design feature to generate professional designs instantly. Users can customize templates and create social media content, presentations, and more.
tools.useCase: Social media graphics, presentations, marketing materials, posters, invitations
